summary: Shifted the opening from a time-led setup to an action-led Lena entry, preserving the block-party scene while bringing the phone/Union Station residue forward and keeping the chapter structurally distinct from Chapter 9's date-led opening. No calibration example lines were present in the style bible source provided.
edits: Rewrote the first paragraph to open on Lena balancing on the chair and taping down the paper runner.
Moved the block-party scene-setting under Lena's immediate vantage instead of a clock-time lead.
Kept the existing phone-vibration and Union Station continuity in the opening without changing chapter beats.
